dict.string: SUBQUERY(extensionItems, $e, SUBQUERY($e.attachments, $a, ANY $a.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.adobe.pdf" OR ANY $a.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.image" OR ANY $a.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.jpeg" OR ANY $a.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.png").@count >= 1).@count >= 1
